name: La Jolla Lending
description_short: San Diego-based mortgage lender offering fixed and adjustable rate mortgages for home purchases, refinances, and debt consolidation with online applications and loan officer support.
description_long:
La Jolla Lending is a mortgage lending company based in San Diego, California, operating out of 925 B Street, Suite 403. The company positions itself as a home loan specialist focused on providing personalized service to borrowers navigating the mortgage process. Founded on principles of honesty, integrity, and competence, the firm aims to deliver competitive interest rates and closing costs while helping borrowers overcome financing obstacles.

The company offers a range of mortgage products including fixed-rate and adjustable-rate mortgages for multiple loan purposes: home purchases, refinances, debt consolidation, and home equity loans. Loan amounts span from under $75,000 to $2,000,000+. La Jolla Lending provides online tools including secure loan applications, pre-qualification assessment, and interactive mortgage calculators to help borrowers evaluate financing scenarios. The application process is designed to take approximately 12 minutes to complete online.

La Jolla Lending differentiates itself through the Loanzify App, which guides borrowers through the mortgage financing process and connects them directly to their loan officer and real estate agent. The company emphasizes community-based loan officers who work with borrowers to match them with appropriate mortgage products. The website highlights the use of modern technology to streamline the mortgage experience while maintaining personalized service.

The company operates with transparent contact information and consent-based marketing communication. Borrowers can reach the company via phone at (858) 876-4864 or email at DPerry@LaJollaLending.com. While the website clearly outlines their mission and services, prospective borrowers should note that specific interest rates, fees, and detailed product comparisons are not published on the website, requiring direct contact for rate quotes.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Online secure loan application can be completed in approximately 12 minutes
Loanzify App integrates direct communication with loan officer and realtor in one platform
Offers loan programs across wide range of loan amounts ($75K to $2M+)
Provides interactive mortgage calculators for borrowers to evaluate scenarios before applying
Supports multiple loan types: purchases, refinances, debt consolidation, and home equity
Pre-qualification available online without full application
Community-based loan officers available for personalized guidance
cons: No specific interest rates or fee schedules published on website; rates require direct contact
Limited information about credit score requirements or lending standards publicly available
No customer reviews, testimonials, or third-party ratings visible on website
Company size, years in business, and number of loan officers not disclosed
No published information about loan approval timelines or closing process details
best_for: San Diego-area homebuyers seeking personalized mortgage service with community-based loan officers
Borrowers comfortable with online applications who want to pre-qualify before formal application
Homeowners considering refinances or debt consolidation through home equity products
Borrowers seeking guidance through Loanzify App to coordinate with realtor and lender simultaneously
diagnosis: La Jolla Lending is best for San Diego-area borrowers seeking a streamlined online mortgage application process combined with personalized loan officer guidance, particularly those who value integrated communication through the Loanzify App. The main caveat is that critical pricing information (rates and fees) is not available on the website, requiring direct contact to compare offers against other lenders.
services: Loanzify App for loan tracking and communication
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 925 B St Suite 403, San Diego, CA 92101
meta_description: San Diego mortgage lender offering fixed and adjustable mortgages for home purchases, refinances, and debt consolidation with online applications.
